backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that manages videos, contact form messages, user profiles, thumbnails, and domain verification, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the ScreenRecorder component was updated to display an in-app video preview player after recording completes, with high confidence and mapped to test REQ-6.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, pages, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a monochromatic light and dark color theme used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'MECT EW' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Empty file with no content; the AboutSection component has no implementation present.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component with a two-tab layout exposing MessageManagement and DomainManagement sub-components.
Empty file with no content; the AnalysisSection component has no implementation present.
frontend/src/components/ConsultancySecti: Empty file with no content; the ConsultancySection component has no implementation present.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Reusable contact form component with name, email, and message fields that validates input and submits to the backend via the useSubmitContactForm mutation, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Empty file with no content; the ContactSection component has no implementation present.
frontend/src/components/DomainManagement: Admin component for configuring and verifying a custom domain by displaying required DNS records (CNAME and TXT) and checking DNS propagation via Google's DNS API.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FormSpecificMess: Component that displays, replies to, and deletes messages for a specific form type (e.g., consultoría, mentoría), using dialogs for reply and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with logo, nav links, Internet Identity authentication, and an admin badge shown when the authenticated user has admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/ManualVideoUploa: Admin component for uploading video files (MP4, MOV, AVI, WebM) up to 2GB to the backend, with file validation, upload progress tracking, and category/file-type selection.
frontend/src/components/MessageManagemen: Admin component that lists all messages across form types with filtering by form type and status, and supports replying and deleting messages via dialogs.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/ScreenRecorder.t: A React component that provides screen recording functionality with microphone/system audio options, upload progress tracking, and video metadata (title, category) configuration before uploading to the backend.
frontend/src/components/VideoGallery.tsx: A React component that displays a grid of videos with thumbnail caching, a playback dialog that streams video via the actor, and admin-only delete functionality.
A placeholder component that renders a card indicating video management functionality is currently unavailable.
frontend/src/components/VideoManagementP: An admin panel component for managing videos with features including search/filter, delete, download, thumbnail upload/revert, title editing, and view count display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing admin access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile management, admin checks, video CRUD operations, thumbnail management, and contact form submissions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a monochromatic grayscale design system in both light and dark modes, plus custom scrollbar and utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying biographical text about the site owner's background as a technical analyst specializing in Elliott Wave Theory.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and an admin role check, rendering the AdminPanel component only for authorized users.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Analysis page that displays financial market videos organized by category in tabs, with admin-only tools for screen recording, manual video upload, and video management.
frontend/src/pages/ConsultancyPage.tsx: Consultancy page with a contact form for consultation requests and an admin-only message management panel for the consultoria form type.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a general contact form and an admin-only message management panel for the contacto form type.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Full-viewport hero page displaying a grayscale financial markets background image with no additional content.
frontend/src/pages/MentoringPage.tsx: Mentoring page describing Elliott Wave mentorship services, with a contact form and an admin-only message management panel for the mentoria form type.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clean URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, font families, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 12) describing the MECT EW ICP-hosted web app's architecture, including Motoko backend, React frontend, role-based access control, video/message management features, and a list of known issues and architectural notes.
